name: Investment Memo V2 (EODHD Based)
description: Investment memo identical in structure to the original Overview but with 100% of underlying data sourced exclusively from EODHD's All-In-One API. Every field is annotated with ✓ EODHD (verified) or — (not provided by EODHD). LLM-generated narrative (Snapshot, Bull, Bear, Recommendation) is grounded only in EODHD inputs.
